legal_privacy_policy_content:
PRIVACY POLICY

3.1. General
This Privacy Policy sets out the principles regarding the processing of personal data collected through the mobile application and digital platforms operated by TOURLİO TURİZM ARACILIK HİZMETLERİ A.Ş. ("Tourlio").

3.2. Data Collected
• Identity and contact information (name, surname, email)
• Reservation and transaction information
• Application usage data
• Limited information regarding payment transactions (card details are not stored)

3.3. Purposes of Data Processing
• Providing tour, transfer and intermediary services
• Conducting reservation and payment transactions
• Improving user experience
• Fulfilling legal obligations

3.4. Data Sharing
Personal data may be shared with business partners and authorized public institutions in accordance with applicable legislation, only to the extent required by the service.

3.5. Data Security
Tourlio takes technical and administrative measures to ensure the security of personal data.

3.6. Rights Under Data Protection Law
Users may exercise their rights under applicable data protection legislation by contacting info@tourlio.com.
legal_kvkk_content:
DATA PROTECTION NOTICE

Within the scope of the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), personal data belonging to our users is processed for the purposes of providing tour, transfer and intermediary services through the Tourlio application, conducting reservation transactions, improving user experience, and fulfilling legal obligations.

Your personal data is protected in accordance with the relevant legislation and is shared with third parties only to the extent required by the service. You may submit your requests regarding your rights under data protection law to info@tourlio.com.
legal_sales_agreement_content:
DISTANCE SALES AGREEMENT

2.1. Parties

Seller Information
Trade Name: TOURLİO TURİZM ARACILIK HİZMETLERİ ANONİM ŞİRKETİ
Address: Kandilli Mahallesi, Rasathane Caddesi Kandilli Rasathanesi Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü No: 104/13, İç Kapı No: 2 Üsküdar / İstanbul, Türkiye
Tax Office: Üsküdar
Tax Number: 8581061811
Email: info@tourlio.com

Buyer: The user who purchases services through the Tourlio mobile application or website

2.2. Subject of the Agreement
The subject of this agreement is the determination of the rights and obligations of the parties regarding the sale and performance of tours, transfers and similar services purchased electronically by the buyer through Tourlio.

2.3. Service Information
• The type, content, date, time and price of the service are specified on the order confirmation screen and in the notification sent to the user.
• Stated prices include VAT.

2.4. Payment
• Payments are made by credit card, debit card or other digital payment methods offered in the application.
• The service reservation is not confirmed until payment is completed.

2.5. Performance of Service
• The purchased service is performed at the specified date and time.
• The buyer is responsible if they are late or withdraw from the service in a way that prevents its commencement.

2.6. Right of Withdrawal
• Pursuant to Article 15 of the Distance Contracts Regulation, there is no right of withdrawal for services that must be performed on a specific date.
• The buyer acknowledges this condition by completing the purchase.

2.7. Force Majeure
• Natural disasters, weather conditions, decisions of official authorities and similar events beyond the control of the parties are considered force majeure.
• In such cases, the agreement may be suspended or cancelled.

2.8. Competent Court
• For disputes arising from this agreement, Consumer Arbitration Committees within the monetary limits announced by the T.R. Ministry of Commerce, and Consumer Courts where these limits are exceeded, shall have jurisdiction.

2.9. Effectiveness
• By making a purchase through Tourlio, the buyer declares that they have read, understood and accepted all provisions of this agreement.
